meta.summary: Bioconductor pqsfinder 2.28.0 runtime with full R access and a stable FASTA-to-TSV G-quadruplex scanning helper.
meta.description: Bioconductor pqsfinder 2.28.0 runtime with full R access and a stable FASTA-to-TSV G-quadruplex scanning helper.

test: Rscript --version 2>&1 | grep -F 'Rscript (R) version 4.6.0' >/dev/null && Rscript -e 'stopifnot(as.character(BiocManager::version()) == "3.23"); stopifnot(as.character(packageVersion("pqsfinder")) == "2.28.0"); stopifnot(packageDescription("BH", fields = "Version") == "1.87.0-1")' && pqsfinder-runtime-info | grep -F 'pqsfinder	2.28.0' >/dev/null && pqsfinder-runtime-info | grep -F 'BH	1.87.0-1' >/dev/null

Rscript -e 'pkgs <- c("pqsfinder","Biostrings","GenomicRanges","IRanges","S4Vectors","Rcpp"); missing <- pkgs[!vapply(pkgs, requireNamespace, logical(1), quietly=TRUE)]; if (length(missing)) stop(paste("missing", paste(missing, collapse=",")))'

pqsfinder-scan --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Scan DNA or RNA FASTA records for potential G-quadruplex-forming sequences' >/dev/null && pqsfinder-scan --version 2>&1 | grep -Fx 'pqsfinder-scan 2.28.0' >/dev/null

tmp=/tmp/taf-pqsfinder-index-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; printf '%s\n' '>perfect_g4' 'GGGAGGGAGGGAGGG' '>background' 'ACATACATACATACAT' > "$tmp/input.fa"; pqsfinder-scan --input "$tmp/input.fa" --output "$tmp/hits.tsv" --output-fasta "$tmp/hits.fa" --density-output "$tmp/density.tsv" --strand + --min-score 1 --max-defects 0; test -s "$tmp/hits.tsv"; test -s "$tmp/hits.fa"; test -s "$tmp/density.tsv"; grep -F 'sequence_id' "$tmp/hits.tsv" >/dev/null; grep -F 'perfect_g4' "$tmp/hits.tsv" >/dev/null; grep -F 'position' "$tmp/density.tsv" >/dev/null; rm -rf "$tmp"

upstream.name: pqsfinder
upstream.citation: Hon et al. 2017, pqsfinder: an exhaustive and imperfection-tolerant search tool for potential quadruplex-forming sequences in R, Bioinformatics
